items.title: Ticketmaster-owner Live Nation overcharged fans as illegal monopoly, jury finds
items.dek: The lawsuit said the firm's practices had led to higher ticket prices and worse service for customers.
items.body: The lawsuit said the firm's practices had led to higher ticket prices and worse service for customers.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli triple-tap strike kills three paramedics in Lebanon, officials say
items.dek: Lebanon's government condemns as a "flagrant crime" the killing of the paramedics, one of whom featured in a BBC report.
items.body: Lebanon's government condemns as a "flagrant crime" the killing of the paramedics, one of whom featured in a BBC report.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: SantaCon organiser charged with stealing $1m from charity pub crawl
items.dek: Prosecutors say Stefan Pildes spent hundreds of thousands of $2.7m raised for charity on personal expenses.
items.body: Prosecutors say Stefan Pildes spent hundreds of thousands of $2.7m raised for charity on personal expenses.
items.author: IriLine Desk
